NemoHermes.display_desc: 自动把重计算任务分给GPU集群，不用自己折腾调度
NemoHermes.scenario: 跑大模型或科学计算时，想自动用上GPU算力

hermes-android.name: hermes-android
hermes-android.description: Android device bridge with full Python toolset.
hermes-android.display_desc: 把安卓手机变成Python开发环境，直接跑脚本控制硬件
hermes-android.scenario: 想用手机当微型电脑跑Python程序时

agent-android.name: agent-android
agent-android.description: LAN-first Android control over WiFi. No USB/ADB/root needed. Health checks, taps, swipes, screenshots, inspect→act→smoke flows.
agent-android.display_desc: 不用USB/ADB/root，WiFi下就能控制安卓手机，点、滑、截图、检查，一条龙搞定
agent-android.scenario: 远程调试或自动化测试安卓设备时，省去连线和权限麻烦

hermescraft.name: hermescraft
hermescraft.description: Embodied Minecraft companion with persistent memory. Learns building preferences across sessions.
hermescraft.display_desc: 能记住你建房偏好的AI伙伴，跨会话学习你的建筑风格

Hermes-mars-rover.name: Hermes-mars-rover
Hermes-mars-rover.description: Mars rover sim with ROS2 and Gazebo. Hermes skill loop for navigation improvement.
Hermes-mars-rover.display_desc: 用ROS2和Gazebo模拟火星车，自动优化导航路径

hermes-miniverse.name: hermes-miniverse

resemble-ai/detect-skill.name: resemble-ai/detect-skill

hermes-agent-camel.name: hermes-agent-camel

anihermes.name: anihermes

Wizards-of-the-Ghosts.name: Wizards-of-the-Ghosts

colony-skill.name: colony-skill
